name: entertainment-tadka/telegram-bot
description: Entertainment Tadka Telegram Movie Bot - Complete OTT Search Bot

post-install-cmd: chmod 666 movies.csv users.json bot_stats.json movie_requests.json user_settings.json delete_queue.json filter_sessions.json bot_activity.log || true
echo '✅ Installation complete! Don\'t forget to set webhook: yourdomain.com/?setwebhook=1'
post-update-cmd: chmod 666 movies.csv users.json bot_stats.json movie_requests.json user_settings.json delete_queue.json filter_sessions.json bot_activity.log || true
